raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Mahtei bija Zibena
Wahrda no Versabas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas darrija/ kas tam
KUNGA M labbi patikke/ wiffâ
fawa Laika/ kamehr tas Preeste-
ris Jojadius winnu mahzija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Augstumi ween ne tap-
pe nopohstiti/ jo tee Landis up-
pureja un kwehpinaja wehl us
teem Augstumeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas fazzija us teem
Preestereim: Wiffa ta Nauda/
kas Deewam par Gohdu tohp
dohta/ ka ta KUNGA Namma
tohp nesta/ ta Nauda/ kas
(Prezzineeku Starpâ) tekk/
ta Nauda/ ko itweens Zilweks
dohd/ pehz to/ ka tas spreests irr/
un wiffa ta Nauda/ ko ikkatrs
labbis Prahtis dohd/ ka ta KUN-
GA Namma tohp nesta/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To buhs teem Preestereem
pee sew neint/ ikkatram no fawa
Pasihstama. Un teem buhs ta
Namna Plithfumus atkat zeetus
darriht/ kur tee atrohd to effam
fagruifschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas notifkahs dtividef.
mitâ un treschâ Gaddâ Joasa/
ka tee Preestexi to eegruifschu
Nammu ne bijakat stiprinajtchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja tas Kehniatsch
Joas to Preesteri Jojadu / un
tohs zittus Preesterus/ un fazzi-
ja us teem: Rapehz juhs ne stip-
rinajeet atkat to Nammu/ kas ta
irr eegruifs? nu tad ne nemmeet
wairs Naudu no jubsfeem Pasih-
stameem/ itt ka gribbedami to par
to fagruifschu Nammu isdoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fohlia tee Preest
warts Naudu no teen Laud
ne nemnt/ nedg to eegruifs
Nannu atkat stiprinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Preesteris Jo-
dus nehine weenu Schkirstu/
ce-urbe Zaurumu ta pascha Wi-
kâ/ un likke to fahnis to Alt
pa labbo Rohku/ kad kas
KUNGA Namma nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tee nu redseja da-
Naudas Schkirstâ effam /
nahze ta Kehnina Skrihwer-
un tas Augstajs Preesteris a-
fchaim/ un fatehje un skaitija
Naudu/ kas par ta KUNGA
Nammu atrasts tappc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee eeskaitija to Na-
du teem Darba Peeluhkotaje
Rohkâ/ kas eezelti bija pahr
KUNGA Nammu. Un tee
dewe to teem Remmescheem/
Namna-Darritajeem / kas
KUNGA Nammu pataitija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Prohti teem Muhr-
keem un Akmizu-Zirtejeem /
ka tee Rohkus un zirstus At-
nus pirktu/ ka tas eegruifs Na-
ta KUNGA atkat taptu sti-
nahts/ un par wiffu/ kas bija
isdohd par ta Namna Ist-
schanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tattchu preeksch ta KU-
GA Nammu ne tappa tu-
fudraba Kaufi/ Spehles /
keni/ Trummetes/ nedg �
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
